steps.t: The Watchman can be found in Dínadab in northern Lamedon. You should speak with the Watchman about what should be done next against the Corsair threat…
Lothgobel is in central Lamedon. You should investigate Lothgobel for signs of Corsair intrusion.
Homes can be found in Lothgobel in central Lamedon. You should search homes for signs of Gondorians or the invading Corsairs.
You have seen a great deal of evidence showing that the enemies here are uniformly loyal to a Corsair named Jajax. You should seek out this captain an…
